payment_sandbox.note: Complete the full checkout in Stripe test mode only. Use the test card below. Verify order confirmation page. Do NOT use real card numbers.

test_card.note: Stripe universal test card. Always approves in test mode.

qa_persona.note: Use these details for all billing/shipping and account creation fields.

report.work_product_title: Wipptrail eCommerce Full Checkout E2E Report

critical_flows.name: Membership Full Checkout (E2E)
steps: Select a membership option (e.g. Light Membership)
Navigate to the cart page and verify the correct product and total are shown
Verify that the checkout is in Stripe test mode (test mode badge or test key indicator must be visible). If live gateway is detected, ABORT immediately with FAIL.
Fill in all billing fields using the qa_persona from the config
If a guest checkout or account creation option is presented, proceed as guest using qa_persona email. If account creation is required, fill in name, email and a throwaway password (QaTest2024!)
Fill in the Stripe card fields: card number from test_card.number, expiry from test_card.expiry, CVC from test_card.cvv
Click the Pay / Place Order / Bestellen button
Wait for the order confirmation page to load
Capture the order number, confirmation message, and any receipt details shown on screen
pass_criteria: membership added to cart with correct price
checkout renders payment fields in Stripe test mode
all billing fields accepted without validation errors
Stripe test card accepted without error
order confirmation page loads with a visible order number or success message
no console errors or PHP notices during the flow
no real transaction executed (test mode confirmed throughout)
fail_criteria: live payment gateway detected at any point
checkout page blank or fatal error
Stripe card fields fail to render
test card declined or produces unexpected error
no order confirmation page after payment submission
JS or PHP fatal error during checkout
